notice: General public information only. A tax bill, notice, court order, permit, license, entity type, election, or individual facts may create a different deadline. Confirm every date with the linked official agency.

deadlines.title: Property-tax lien date
deadlines.description: Property is generally valued and the tax lien attaches for the upcoming fiscal year.

deadlines.title: Timely exemption claims
deadlines.description: Common timely filing date for homeowners, veterans, disabled veterans and several institutional exemption claims. Eligibility and late-filing rules differ.

deadlines.title: Business property statement due
deadlines.description: Business personal property, boat and aircraft statements are generally due. Filing requirements depend on the assessor's request and property type.

deadlines.title: Secured property tax — second installment
deadlines.description: Last regular statewide delinquency date for the second secured-property-tax installment. Weekend and legal-holiday rules may move it to the next business day.

deadlines.title: Business property statement penalty date
deadlines.description: Common last day to file a business property statement without the statutory late-filing penalty. Confirm with the county assessor.

deadlines.title: Secured property becomes tax-defaulted
deadlines.description: Unpaid current secured taxes generally become tax-defaulted after the fiscal year closes, with added redemption penalties and costs.

deadlines.title: Regular assessment-appeal period opens
deadlines.description: The regular-roll assessment appeal period commonly opens July 2. Closing dates can be September 15 or November 30 depending on the county and notice practices.

deadlines.title: Unsecured property tax deadline
deadlines.description: Most unsecured property tax bills issued by July 31 become delinquent after August 31. A later-issued bill can carry a different date printed on the bill.

deadlines.title: Common regular assessment-appeal deadline
deadlines.description: Many California counties close the regular assessment-appeal period September 15; some use November 30. The county result identifies this as a verify-first deadline.

deadlines.title: California individual return extended filing date
deadlines.description: Typical extended filing deadline for calendar-year individual California returns. An extension to file is not an extension to pay, and disaster relief can change dates.

deadlines.title: Register for the 2026 California General Election
deadlines.description: Online or postmark deadline. Conditional same-day registration remains available in person afterward through Election Day.

deadlines.title: Secured property tax — first installment due
deadlines.description: The first installment is due. It generally becomes delinquent after December 10.

deadlines.title: Alternative regular assessment-appeal deadline
deadlines.description: Counties using the later regular-roll appeal period may close November 30. Confirm the filing period printed by the county clerk or assessment appeals board.

deadlines.title: Secured property tax — first installment delinquency date
deadlines.description: Last regular statewide date to pay the first secured-property-tax installment without a delinquency penalty. Weekend and legal-holiday rules may move it.

deadlines.title: California individual income-tax filing and payment
deadlines.description: Typical calendar-year return and payment deadline. Weekend, holiday, disaster-relief and taxpayer-specific rules can change it.

conditional.title: Supplemental or escape assessment appeal
conditional.reason: Usually measured from the mailing date on a notice or tax bill, often 60 days.

conditional.title: Court appearance, response or appeal
conditional.reason: Controlled by the specific case, service date, court order and procedural rules.

conditional.title: Landlord, tenant and eviction notices
conditional.reason: Depends on notice type, service method, local ordinance, tenancy facts and court holidays.

conditional.title: Permit, license and professional renewal
conditional.reason: Depends on issuing agency and the holder's expiration date.

conditional.title: Vehicle registration and insurance
conditional.reason: Depends on the vehicle and individualized DMV or insurer notice.

conditional.title: Statement of Information
conditional.reason: Depends on entity type and formation or registration month.
